flow_ui_elements.name: Text-to-Video Tab
flow_ui_elements.ui_location: Top navigation bar > Text to Video
flow_ui_elements.function: Main entry point for text-prompt-based video generation. Contains prompt input, style selectors, and generate button.
risks: Easy to waste credits on poorly structured prompts
best_practices: Structure prompts: PRODUCT + CAMERA + LIGHTING + MOTION + ATMOSPHERE

flow_ui_elements.name: Image-to-Video Tab
flow_ui_elements.ui_location: Top navigation bar > Image to Video
flow_ui_elements.function: Upload reference image + text prompt for product-anchored video generation.
best_practices: Use clean product-on-dark or product-on-white photos

flow_ui_elements.name: Prompt Input Field
flow_ui_elements.function: Primary text prompt input. Supports up to ~500 characters. Earlier terms have more weight.

flow_ui_elements.name: Generate Button
flow_ui_elements.function: Submits prompt and starts generation. Consumes 1 credit per press.

flow_ui_elements.name: Aspect Ratio Selector
risks: Wrong ratio = wasted generation for target platform

flow_ui_elements.name: Motion Intensity Slider
flow_ui_elements.function: Controls camera movement speed/intensity. May not be present in all Flow versions.
risks: May conflict with prompt motion keywords
best_practices: Match slider to prompt motion keyword
Default to medium unless specific need

flow_ui_elements.name: Style Presets
flow_ui_elements.function: Predefined visual style options: Cinematic, Realistic, Artistic, etc.
risks: Not all presets work for product ads

flow_ui_elements.name: Extend Button
flow_ui_elements.function: Extends generated video by 2-4 additional seconds.

flow_ui_elements.name: Frame Export Button
flow_ui_elements.function: Exports current frame as still image. Critical for continuity workflows.
risks: Export quality may be lower than original
best_practices: Build frame library by product + style

flow_ui_elements.name: Scene Builder Panel
flow_ui_elements.function: Multi-scene video planning interface. Storyboard view with scene slots.
risks: Not all Flow tiers include this
best_practices: Keep scenes simple: 1 motion per scene

flow_ui_elements.name: Ingredients Panel
flow_ui_elements.function: Upload multiple reference images as 'ingredients' for generation.
best_practices: One product image + one style reference

flow_ui_elements.name: Generation History
flow_ui_elements.function: Shows past generations with prompts. Allows re-generation from history.
risks: Old prompts may not work with updated models

flow_ui_elements.name: Download Button
flow_ui_elements.function: Downloads generated video as MP4. Available after generation completes.

flow_ui_elements.name: Credit Display
risks: Does not show credit cost BEFORE generation
Daily reset time may not be displayed
best_practices: Plan multi-clip projects around credit budget
